{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Scope check: Do you want (A) light copyediting only—grammar, clarity, and concision without reframing or reordering (R1.6), or (B) a more substantive pass that may reorganize the narrative and tighten/temper claims in addition to copyedits (adds R1.1, R1.2, R1.5 alongside R1.6)?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "“Clean this up” most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level polish for clarity, flow, and concision.",
    "RX.1": "During polishing, preserve or appropriately signal uncertainty rather than strengthen claims beyond the text.",
    "RX.2": "Ensure edits avoid introducing overclaims or overstating empirical findings.",
    "RX.3": "Keep the work within the requested scope of textual clean-up unless broader changes are explicitly authorized.",
    "RX.4": "Avoid phrasing that could mislead readers about safe or appropriate use of bioactivity predictions.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain provenance by not adding new facts and keeping all edits traceable to the provided artifact."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Scope check: Do you want (A) light copyediting only—grammar, clarity, and concision without reframing or reordering (R1.6), or (B) a more substantive pass that may reorganize the narrative and tighten/temper claims in addition to copyedits (adds R1.1, R1.2, R1.5 alongside R1.6)?

rationale.R1.6: “Clean this up” most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level polish for clarity, flow, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: During polishing, preserve or appropriately signal uncertainty rather than strengthen claims beyond the text.
rationale.RX.2: Ensure edits avoid introducing overclaims or overstating empirical findings.
rationale.RX.3: Keep the work within the requested scope of textual clean-up unless broader changes are explicitly authorized.
rationale.RX.4: Avoid phrasing that could mislead readers about safe or appropriate use of bioactivity predictions.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain provenance by not adding new facts and keeping all edits traceable to the provided artifact.
